feed.title: AO3 - Merlin/Arthur Pendragon (Merlin) (Filtered)
feed.subtitle: Latest works for Merlin/Arthur Pendragon (Merlin) on Archive of Our Own [English, No ABO]

entry.title: A straight approach to being queer
entry.summary:
Author: SueRose

Rating: ExplicitLanguage: EnglishWords: 105,376Chapters: 26/?Kudos: 89

Summary: Rich nepo boy Arthur Pendragon joins his university's queer club. And pretends to be queer, because he needs to write a paper about queer representation. But.... He has not expected this. This being the leader of the club, namely Merlins Emrys, who does not believe a word he says. Will he be able to appear queer enough to his new peers? Or will all of this end up in a giant disaster?

  • Creator Chose Not To Use Archive Warnings

entry.title: Sunlight
entry.summary:
Author: maryofmossandmoonmilk

Rating: ExplicitLanguage: EnglishWords: 30,472Chapters: 15/?Kudos: 131

Summary: In a world in which Arthur told Merlin to leave and never come back after finding out about his magic.A year later Merlin is back and ready to defend Camelot with his magic.....but he's not the same Merlin.

entry.title: Princes should not eat
entry.summary:
Author: Ladi_albion

Rating: General AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 25,575Chapters: 16/?Kudos: 79

Summary: Merlin has been especially irritable since Freya's death and finds the perfect outlet in seeing how he can annoy Arthur by teasing him about his weight and how much the prince eats. But it turns out that Arthur Pendragon is much more susceptible to his servant's opinion than he imagines. And so an eating disorder is born. A modern disease that no one understands and that, to Merlin's despair, may prevent Albion's destiny from never being fulfilled.

  • No Archive Warnings Apply

Author: metalisthewaymydudes

Rating: Not RatedLanguage: EnglishWords: 759Chapters: 1/1Kudos: 5

entry.title: Three Teardrops
entry.summary:
Author: grlnxtdr29

Rating: Teen And Up AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 33,514Chapters: 14/14Kudos: 35

Summary: The Search for the Dragon Eggs continues in this sequel to Of Legends and (Rugby) Kings. Now that Charlie and the Paris Squad are starting to remember their past, it is time to focus on helping the Sorcerer complete his Quest to restore the Dragon Race, and bring Magick back to the world. Along the way, they will encounter old foes, and new ones, while discovering things about themselves they never realized before. There will be memories of Camelot, and perhaps even some surprises along the way!

  • No Archive Warnings Apply

entry.title: Sublysis
entry.summary:
Author: RubiesareforHunting

Rating: Not RatedLanguage: EnglishWords: 183,249Chapters: 16/?Kudos: 444

Summary: Merlin is a great detective. They call him Magic, for a reason. But when Arthur Pendragon realizes that the famous detective who has been plaguing his criminal organization for five years, is designated Submissive…well. All’s fair in love and war. At an impasse where both of them will do anything it takes to keep the other one from revealing their secrets, the only way to survive might just be a truce that neither of their organizations can know about.Mutually assured destruction never felt so good.

entry.title: Lost to All But Time
entry.summary:
Author: a_written_simulacra

Rating: Not RatedLanguage: EnglishWords: 5,365Chapters: 2/5Kudos: 22

Summary: Merlin has waited beside the lake for over 1,500 years, and when he finally gets a visitor, it's not Arthur Pendragon--but an eccentric English man who arrives in a blue telephone box, calls himself the Doctor, and claims that not only is time travel real, but it's absolutely imperative that Merlin go back in time with him--back to the age of Camelot where Prince Arthur is very much alive.

entry.title: A Coin With Two Faces
entry.summary:
Author: TheDrow

Rating: ExplicitLanguage: EnglishWords: 16,247Chapters: 1/1Kudos: 37

Summary: TW: Suicide Arthur wakes to find a black serpent coiled on his bed, which is frightening enough. But then Merlin bursts into his chambers and magics the creature out of existence. Magic is outlawed in Camelot, and the reveal of Merlin's magic leaves Arthur with no choice but to sentence his loyal and once-trusted friend to death. Which goes somehow worse than what one might expect for it to go. And then Arthur wakes up; and there's a black serpent coiled on his bed. And then Merlin is bursting through the doors...

entry.title: it's not my fire, but was forged in flame
entry.summary:
Author: elfesetamour

Rating: MatureLanguage: EnglishWords: 23,071Chapters: 10/?Kudos: 17

Summary: Unable to heal from Camelot’s greatest loss, Merlin is haunted by nightmares—or something more sinister—of Arthur. But, despite the undeniable resemblance, it’s impossible that the Arthur in his dreams is the same one he’d held in his arms as he died. Searching through the Mist, Merlin leaves his old life behind in search of a new destiny, which brings him to Paris, 1643. In a land of feuds and a time of revolution, among old faces as well as new, Merlin searches for meaning side by side with Arthur again. But whether he can come to terms with their differences, or accept his feelings for this new Arthur, all the while protecting him, may be a greater challenge than he signed up for. "That was Arthur, standing right in front of him. Yes, he wasn’t completely the same but that was him-no mistake. A scar visible on his cheek, and that beard covering his face couldn’t fool Merlin. He knew Arthur better than that. " Merlin’s magic takes him on a journey through time to Musketeer Era France, where he meets Arthur, the Captain of the King’s Red Guard. Ruthless, bloodthirsty, and emotionally closed off, Merlin seems unable to deny anything this new Arthur asks of him.

  • Creator Chose Not To Use Archive Warnings

entry.title: Just Hold Me (I Can't)
entry.summary:
Author: Ashalea

Rating: MatureLanguage: EnglishWords: 21,466Chapters: 4/12Kudos: 7

Summary: “Oh!” Ygraine startled, scurrying away from his hands. “Could you put those down, please?” Merlin hummed in question, once again not understanding her. “Put what down?” “Your weapons, dear.” She gestured to his hands. “I promise you won’t need them with me.” Merlin looked down at his hands, scissor blades scraped together to create fingers where flesh and nails should be. “These are my hands. I’m not finished.” “Oh.”   The Edward Scissorhands AU I've always wanted to write.

entry.title: Open mouth, insert — (Foot, sire, I meant FOOT!)
entry.summary:
Author: Diana_Prallon

Rating: Teen And Up AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 4,611Chapters: 1/1Kudos: 67

Summary: Merlin came to a sudden stop when he noticed that:A. Uther was still staring at him, but, now, instead of a raised eyebrow, he had both his eyes wide open in horror.B. Merlin had got carried away and called Arthur “Your Royal Prattishness” in front of the king.C. Uther had heard him and probably the only reason Merlin wasn’t being dragged to the stocks right away was because Uther was still too shocked to function.

entry.title: I'll Save You A Seat
entry.summary:
Author: sherrwin

Rating: General AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 3,274Chapters: 1/4Kudos: 4

Summary: This short story entails CEO Arthur Pendragon and the one that got away: Merlin Emrys.With a Little Twist: Along with Merlin, follows two young boys of his. His tremendous bundles of joy yet bane of his existence.Together, the two boys unintentionally pull the two lost lovers back together in the absolute most bizarre place: An airplanes’ first class cabin. What else could be said in that situation but, “That’s my son!" Who just so happens to grow up with a father like Merlin, one out of the ordinary.Disclaimer: Merlin has his magic solely for the plot however he wont be using it.

entry.title: Come back, dear friend
entry.summary:
Author: Ineedmoremerthur

Rating: General AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 61Chapters: 1/1Kudos: 0

Summary: Merlin is still waiting for Arthur. After coming back to the lake and seeing it dried up, he decides to write a letter. I saw/heard Mary's letter to Arthur in RDR2 and it already reminded me of Merlin and Arthur, then I remembered the fact that the lake where Arthur was lying is now dried up.Can be read as romantically or platonically

entry.title: The Price
entry.summary:
Author: dante0220

Rating: Teen And Up AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 98,390Chapters: 65/?Kudos: 34

Summary: In the "Wicked Day", Merlin tries to save Uther's life. As Emrys, he tries to cast the healing spell. Unfortunately, Morgana's necklace contains an *extra* twist. As both healing spell and aging spell go wrong, Merlin is forced to flee. Kilgarrah takes him to safety. Mithian and Rodor grant him sanctuary. There Merlin realizes still more about his secondary royal destiny.

entry.title: New Beginnings
entry.summary:
Author: Moontra992

Rating: General AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 15,135Chapters: 11/?Kudos: 94

Summary: The final battle is won. Merlin has fulfilled his destiny. He is dropped from the sky into a new time and place and seeks to fit in and to figure out his new destiny - if there is any. He comes across a kind and welcoming family but soon realises that nothing is quite as it seems...

  • No Archive Warnings Apply

entry.title: Magic?
entry.summary:
Author: Charile_Dearest

Rating: General AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 368Chapters: 1/1Kudos: 16

Summary: Magic. Arthur had heard him say. Magic. Arthur had watched him do.

entry.title: 500 Miles from my home
entry.summary:
Author: alesha_333

Rating: Teen And Up AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 1,413Chapters: 2/?Kudos: 21

Summary: Merlin counts the miles at first. Ten, because he is still able to turn back.Fifty because it finally feels like leaving. A hundred miles from Camelot, he tells himself he will stop. He’ll go back.He doesn’t.The words echo in his mind, the blue in Arthur’s eyes dimming, the flinch at the word *traitor*.

  • Creator Chose Not To Use Archive Warnings

entry.title: Courting the Court Sorcerer
entry.summary:
Author: Harmon_A

Rating: Not RatedLanguage: EnglishWords: 6,685Chapters: 3/?Kudos: 18

Summary: It had been a year or so now, since the magic ban had been reversed, months since Merlin became Court Sorcerer. And a few more weeks since Merlin's injury. Arthur had finally given Merlin the Court-Sorcerer chambers he was promised, that just happened to be down the hall from the kings own . Arthur would insist this was not on purpose, but everyone had seen them around the castle, holding and kissing each others hands, teasing each other as usual but with the addition of grinning at each other. There had been a shift in their relationship, and it meant they were more protective of each other than usual. If it wasn't terrifying, it would probably be sweet. But of course this is Camelot, not everything can stay perfect for too long. Destiny would never allow it. --------------------------- A continuation from the previous fic in this series. (read if you want context for Merlin's injury or their realtionship, but not needed)Merlin and Arthur begin courting, Merlin knows nothing about noble courting rules, Arthur will do anything to protect Merlin.
